columns.dc:description: The name of the organisation to which the counter fraud activity relates.
A Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) which identifies the organisation.
Date at which the information provided is true, in the ISO international date format YYYY-MM-DD.
Unique Property Reference Number - a unique code describing the property held in the Address Gazetteer provided by Ordnance Survey.
A local reference identifier describing the asset.
Common title or name used for the asset. Can include the title or a description of the land such as
Number of the building or land.
Postal road address.
Name of post town or town.
Postcode of the asset where possible. A piece of land may not have a postal address.
Indicates which coordinate reference system the geographic coordinates will refer to. WGS84 refers to the World Geodetic System 84.
Longitude centre point of the asset for plotting on a map.
Latitude centre point of the asset for plotting on a map.
Whether the local authority owns the freehold or leased in the asset.
The tenure arrangements for the asset.
Text description of other tenure type if applicable.
Whether the asset is land, buildings or both.
Gross Internal Area in square metres of the building.
Area in hectares of the land.
Value stated on the Display Energy Certificate under the Energy Performance of Buildings (Certificates and Inspections) (England and Wales) Regulations 2007.
